issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as container startup failures or missing Docker.

scenarios.name: PostgreSQL integration test for a Node.js repository
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses PostgreSqlContainer from @testcontainers/postgresql with withDatabase/withUsername/withPassword and container.getConnectionUri(), wired into beforeAll/afterAll; baseline often falls back to GenericContainer with hand-built connection strings and skips the dedicated postgres module.

scenarios.name: Redis cache integration test with GenericContainer
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses GenericContainer('redis:7-alpine').withExposedPorts(6379) and builds the URL from container.getHost() + container.getMappedPort(6379); baseline frequently hardcodes localhost:6379 instead of using the mapped port helpers.
